title: Base64 to Image Converter
shortDescription: Decode Base64 image strings and preview downloadable image output instantly.
metaTitle: Base64 to Image Converter | Decode and Preview Images
metaDescription: Convert Base64 to image online. Decode Base64 image strings, preview the result instantly, and download the generated image in seconds.
intro: Convert Base64 image data into a viewable image instantly. Paste a Base64 string or data URL, preview the decoded image in your browser, and download the result without installing software.
overview: This Base64 to Image tool is a fast client-side decoder for Base64 image strings. It helps you turn encoded image data into a normal image preview, making it easy to inspect, share, or download the output. Because everything runs in the browser, it is convenient for developers, designers, and anyone working with data URLs or encoded assets.
howItWorks: Paste your Base64 string or full data URL into the input field.
The tool decodes the content and generates an image preview.
Check the output for validity, image type, and display quality.
Download the decoded image file when you are ready.
useCases: Decode Base64 images from APIs, JSON responses, or database records.
Preview image data embedded in HTML, CSS, or app configurations.
Verify whether an encoded string is a valid image before using it in a project.
Quickly extract a viewable image from a data URL for testing or debugging.

examples.title: How to use Base64 to Image
examples.input: Paste a Base64 image string or data:image/... data URL
examples.output: An instant image preview and downloadable file result.
examples.description: Ideal for checking encoded images copied from API responses or frontend code.

examples.title: When to use it
examples.description: Useful when you need to confirm the image without manually decoding it.

faq.question: What kind of Base64 does this tool support?
faq.answer: It supports standard Base64 image strings and data URLs such as data:image/png;base64,...

faq.question: Does the tool keep my images on a server?
faq.answer: No. The conversion runs client-side in your browser, so the image is processed locally.

faq.question: Can I convert any Base64 text into an image?
faq.answer: Only valid image Base64 will render correctly. Non-image or corrupted data will not produce a usable output.

faq.question: Can I download the decoded image?
faq.answer: Yes. After previewing the result, you can download the generated image file.
